model_route_policy.programmatic: local templates plus seeded Tenacious artifacts
model_route_policy.multi_llm_synthesis: OpenRouter dev-tier generation when TENACIOUS_BENCH_USE_OPENROUTER=true and OPENROUTER_API_KEY is set; rotates across ['openai/gpt-4.1-mini', 'qwen/qwen3-32b']; otherwise deterministic stand-ins for reproducible local builds
model_route_policy.hand_authored_adversarial: manual variants derived from probe library
model_route_policy.judge_filter: deterministic evaluator first; per-row judge dimensions are input_coherence, ground_truth_verifiability, and rubric_clarity, each with threshold >= 4; eval-tier calibration family reserved to ['anthropic/claude-3.7-sonnet']
model_route_policy.preference_leakage_policy: no single model family should both generate and judge the same task
